CustomField.description: Interval based on Primary Unit and will be used for MR calculation
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Primary_Unit__c) ="Hours", leaseworks__Interval_2_Hours__c, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Primary_Unit__c) ="Cycles", leaseworks__Interval_2_Cycles__c , IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Primary_Unit__c) ="Months", leaseworks__Interval_2_Months__c,null)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Interval based on Primary Unit and will be used for MR calculation
CustomField.label: Primary Unit Interval
